bits.premise: A farm can fail from having only one useless child.
A broke inheritance can be an overwhelming porn collection.
An untraumatic childhood leaves comedy without useful damage.

lines.text: - Whoo, how we doing?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Man.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: The end of the day,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm just a hick ass farmer from Cattle Mills, Texas.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And the thing about it is,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: if you know anything about farmers,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: the only reason they have kids is to like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: carry on the farm and the cheap farm labor.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Well, I was an only child and a fuck up at that.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So when my dad died, that's why the farm failed.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Now I'm out here doing comedy, fucking that up too.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: It's crazy though, we were so broke
lines.label: setup

lines.text: that when my dad died, all I inherited
lines.label: setup

lines.text: was a porn collection.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: And here's the thing, I used to buy my dad porn.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So I've already seen a third of this collection
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and I don't have enough bodily fluids
lines.label: setup

lines.text: for the other two thirds of this collection.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I'll be damned if I'm going to rehab
lines.label: setup

lines.text: for masturbation addiction.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's like getting cancer from vaping.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: That's just fucking embarrassing.

lines.text: Can't even raise my hand because it's busy.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Shit.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: But I'll tell you what, I don't think I'll make it

lines.text: in stand-up comedy, though.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Man, I had a very untromatic childhood.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: in the church or the scouts.

lines.text: was too busy fucking goats to give me the time of day.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I can't compete with sheep's pussy, nor would I want to.
